protein_name: Belongs to the universal ribosomal protein uS15 family. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: cytoplasm; cytosol; cytosolic ribosome; cytosolic small ribosomal subunit; nucleolus; nucleoplasm; nucleus; postsynaptic density; ribonucleoprotein complex; ribosome; small-subunit processome
raw_fields.Molecular Function: mRNA 5'-UTR binding; mRNA binding; protein binding; structural constituent of ribosome
raw_fields.Biological Process: cytoplasmic translation; maturation of SSU-rRNA from tricistronic rRNA transcript (SSU-rRNA, 5.8S rRNA, LSU-rRNA); negative regulation of RNA splicing; ribosomal small subunit biogenesis; translation
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: 40S ribosomal protein S13; ribosomal protein S13; RPS13; RS13; S13; Small ribosomal subunit protein uS15
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 10.53 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
